---
title: "English title | *French title*"
author: "Alyssa, Macartan, Vin, Yannick"
date: today
format: 
  revealjs:
    embed-resources: true

---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

# title en | *title fr*

## English subtitle? | *French subtitle*

::: {.columns}
::: {.column .lang-en width="50%"}

text

:::
::: {.column .lang-fr width="50%"}

texte

:::
:::


## regular slide

### subheader

stuff here

```{r}

2 + 3
```
